channel.title: vardaan.space
channel.description: An amateur astronomer's astrophotography blog featuring deep-sky captures and processing notes.

item.title: My BEST Moon image till date.
item.description: This image holds a special place in my heart. A waxing gibbous moon, on a night i actually do not remember.

item.title: My first APOD submission
item.description: One of my first REAL astrophotography accomplishments. It represented a level up from just a kid looking through the eyepiece to an amatuer astronomer.
